targets.query: from(bucket: "k6") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k6_vus") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")

from(bucket: "k6") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k6_http_req_duration") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "p(95)") |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "k6") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k6_http_req_duration") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "p(99)") |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean)
from(bucket: "k6") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k6_http_reqs") |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: sum)
from(bucket: "k6") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k6_http_reqs") |> last()
from(bucket: "k6") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k6_http_req_failed") |> last()
